Meta.homeTitle: Nwaya — Intentions for Sleep, Work & Training
Meta.homeDescription: A collection of Islamic intentions for sleep, work, and training, with evidence from the Quran, Sunnah, and the early generations.
Meta.categoryDescription: Islamic intentions for {category}, with evidence from the Quran and Sunnah.

Home.tagline: Sacred intentions for sleep, work, and training — so everyday acts are counted for Allah’s sake.
Home.featuredQuote: Worldly work is according to the worker’s intention: if he intends good by it, it is good; and if he intends otherwise, it is according to what he intended — for the Prophet ﷺ said: “Actions are only by intentions, and every person will have only what he intended.”
Home.featuredQuoteAttribution: Shaykh Ibn Uthaymeen (may Allah have mercy on him) said
Home.secondQuote: How many a small deed is magnified by intention, and how many a great deed is diminished by intention.
Home.secondQuoteAttribution: It is narrated from Ibn al-Mubarak (may Allah have mercy on him)
Home.sleepDescription: Following the Sunnah, giving the body its right, and gaining strength for worship.
Home.workDescription: Lawful earning, providing for family, charity, and independence from people.
Home.gymDescription: Strengthening the body, protecting family, and beautifying oneself with kindness.

Footer.rights: We ask Allah for sincerity and acceptance.
Footer.builtFor: For sincere intention in everyday deeds.
